top_signals.title: Tech Stocks’ Rebound Stalls, Dollar Edges Higher: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A rebound for Asian technology stocks stalled as investors turned cautious about the durability of the AI-driven rally. The dollar rose against most of its major peers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Rafael Nadal's Retirement Is So Great He Doesn't Miss Tennis
top_signals.summary: Francine Lacqua speaks with tennis legend Rafael Nadal about the mindset that fueled his extraordinary career. They explore how resilience, unwavering determination and even self-doubt drove him to overcome repeated injuries and become one of tennis's greatest champions. Nadal also opens up about life after retirement, explaining why he still needs goals every day as he builds businesses, grows his academy, and explores what's next beyond the court.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
